task_completion.description: Open the docker-compose.yml file in the project directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the docker-compose.yml file located at /home/ga/legacy-migration/.

task_completion.description: Configure the network alias for the postgres service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the docker-compose.yml file, the postgres (or postgres-db) service has an 'aliases' list under its network configuration containing 'db.inventory.local'.

task_completion.description: Configure the network alias for the redis service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the docker-compose.yml file, the redis (or redis-cache) service has an 'aliases' list under its network configuration containing 'cache.inventory.local'.

task_completion.description: Configure the network alias for the mock-auth service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the docker-compose.yml file, the mock-auth (or auth-service) service has an 'aliases' list under its network configuration containing 'auth.provider.external'.

task_completion.description: The legacy-app container runs successfully and logs the success message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal shows the logs for the 'legacy-app' container (e.g., from 'docker-compose up' or 'docker logs') containing the text 'All systems go!' or 'All systems go! Application started.'.

integrity.description: The success message appears in genuine Docker logs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal output showing the success message should be the result of a Docker command (like docker-compose up or docker logs), not a manual echo or print command.

integrity.description: The fix is implemented via infrastructure configuration only.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent modifying the application's source code (e.g., Python files) to bypass the hostname resolution, as the source code is immutable.

integrity.description: The actual docker-compose.yml file is edited.
integrity.visual_evidence: The editor must show the file path /home/ga/legacy-migration/docker-compose.yml, not a temporary or differently named file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/legacy-migration. App container: legacy-app. Required aliases: postgres-db service -> db.inventory.local, redis-cache service -> cache.inventory.local, auth-service -> auth.provider.external. Success log: 'All systems go! Application started.'
